---
title: "Projects"
---

## Active project areas

### Web-based predictive calculators

The lab develops clinical prediction models and deploys them as interactive web-based calculators when appropriate. Current areas include intracranial tumors, traumatic brain injury, and registry-based neurosurgical outcomes.

### Neuro-oncology outcomes research

Projects use national and institutional datasets to study treatment patterns, survival, disparities, and prediction in brain and spine tumors.

### Neurotrauma and resource utilization

Projects use ACS TQIP and related trauma datasets to study traumatic brain injury outcomes, discharge needs, ICU utilization, mechanical ventilation, and complications.

### Clinical informatics and registry abstraction

Projects explore scalable, reproducible workflows for extracting structured clinical variables and validating model-assisted abstraction.

### Vascular and perioperative outcomes

Projects evaluate vascular access, genetic aortopathy, perioperative complications, and quality improvement opportunities.
